mapper.select: select id, name, price, original_price, brief, detail, stock, pic, pic2, hot, latest, category_id from product where id = #{id}
select id, name, price, original_price, brief, detail, stock, pic, pic2, hot, latest, category_id from product where category_id = #{categoryId}
select id, name, price, original_price, brief, detail, stock, pic, pic2, hot, latest, category_id from product
select id, name, price, original_price, brief, detail, stock, pic, pic2, hot, latest, category_id from product where hot = 1 limit #{n}
select id, name, price, original_price, brief, detail, stock, pic, pic2, hot, latest, category_id from product where latest = 1 limit #{n}
